issues.description: Action type is 'ReturnToHand' but card text says 'at the bottom of the owner's deck' — should be a deck placement action, not hand return. No standard action exists for this; likely needs custom handling or 'SearchDeck' variant.
Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is correct, but missing 'maxCount':1 to enforce 'up to 1' limit.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] Place up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 6000 power or less at the bottom of the owner's deck.

actions.note: DSL lacks standard action for 'bottom of deck' — this placeholder uses ReturnToHand. Requires custom implementation or new action type.
